details: The agent correctly used mcp__github__list_releases and mcp__github__get_release_by_tag tools to fetch the release data, then accurately reported all three required items from 'What's Changed': (1) fix(compaction) by efe-arv, (2) fix(telegram) by obviyus, and (3) fix: handle Discord gateway metadata fetch failures by jalehman — matching the known facts exactly.
